howItWorks.intro: This subwoofer box volume calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Box Volume
rules.formula: Volume based on driver size × enclosure type × number of drivers
rules.explanation: Manufacturer specs determine optimal volume per driver.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Sealed: tighter bass, smaller box. Ported: louder, deeper bass, bigger box.
Absolutely. Wrong volume changes frequency response, making bass boomy or thin.

steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
